description: Sweepy context manifest. Paths listed here are auto-discovered by agent runtimes that read .contextrc.json (per andrefigueira/.context convention).

paths.description: Root AGENTS.md: architecture map, path-scoped rule table, tier-2 triggers
Error code reference, absorb vs retry policy
Runner control flow, race resume, recovery, 102 relogin, dispatch
Why-we-did-this docs (msgpack+aes, sid regen, device spoof, endpoint remap, rulebased-vs-mcts, runner chain, timing dna, tp strategy, fail-pct parity)
Tier-2 load-on-trigger prompts (fix-bug, add-scenario, refactor, regen master data)
Game API schemas (symlink → docs/api_schemas). Load when editing uma_api/**. Read index.md for endpoint list, then pull relevant JSON/MD per route.
